plan.title: packs:slice v2 -- new patterns pack surface

narratives.Description: Create a new `patterns` pack that ingests the five documents under `patterns/` (which exist today with no pack) following the established 0.1 pilot pattern: a schema with a slice registry, a migration script, the pack JSON, a render registry entry, and tests. This story is independently buildable as greenfield work scoped to net-new files plus a single additive entry in the shared render registry.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add a new `vbrief/schemas/patterns-pack.schema.json` schema file defining the pattern entry shape and an `x-sliceRegistry` with at least `list` and `by-trigger` slices.
2. Add a new `scripts/pack_migrate_patterns.py` migration script that parses `patterns/*.md` into `packs/patterns/patterns-pack-0.1.json`, and register the pack in the `scripts/pack_render.py` RENDER_REGISTRY.
3. Add `tests/cli/test_pack_migrate_patterns.py` asserting migration shape and slice resolution, and confirm `task packs:slice --list-packs` discovers the new pack and `task verify:pack-drift` validates.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent looking for architectural patterns, I want a patterns pack I can slice, so that I can pull pattern guidance into context the same way I load lessons, skills, rules, and strategies.

narrative.Acceptance: Running `task packs:slice --list-packs` shows the new patterns pack with its description alongside the existing four packs.
Running `task packs:slice patterns list` returns every pattern entry migrated from the patterns directory.
Running `task verify:pack-drift` validates the patterns pack with no drift between source and rendered projection.

swarm.missing_traces_justification: Framework-internal packs:slice v2 work traced to GitHub issue #1637 and RFC #1283 Q-list; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies.

references.title: Issue #1637: feat(packs): packs:slice v2 -- remaining lessons slices + skills/rules/strategies pack surfaces
